items.title: Vector Policy Optimization: Training for Diversity Improves Test-Time Search
items.authors: Ryan Bahlous-Boldi, Isha Puri, Idan Shenfeld et al.
items.abstract: Language models must now generalize out of the box to novel environments and work inside inference-scaling search procedures, such as AlphaEvolve, that select rollouts with a variety of task-specific reward functions. Unfortunately, the standard paradigm of LLM post-training optimizes a pre-specifie...

items.title: The Matching Principle: A Geometric Theory of Loss Functions for Nuisance-Robust Representation Learning
items.abstract: Robustness, domain adaptation, photometric and occlusion invariance, compositional generalisation, temporal robustness, alignment safety, and classical anisotropic regularisation are usually treated as separate problems with separate method families. This paper argues that much of their shared struc...
